data.title: Oxbridge Re Announces 2025 Fourth Quarter Results on March 30, 2026
data.description: Oxbridge Re Holdings Limited, a company involved in tokenized Real-World Assets and reinsurance solutions, is set to host a conference call on March 30, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time. The call will address the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025. The results will be disclosed in a press release after the market closes on the same day. Investors and the public can participate in the call to hear from Oxbridge Re's management and engage in a question and answer session. The company is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol OXBR.

data.title: US delays sanctions on certain Iranian oil to increase market availability, expecting 140M barrels of crude added.
data.description: Secretary of the Treasury Scott Bessent approximated that this action would introduce roughly 140 million barrels of crude oil into the market.

data.title: Function Expands Its Growing Portfolio of AI Connectors with Perplexity Health
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on March 20, 2026, Function revealed plans to allow its members to securely link their health information with Perplexity Health. This partnership signifies a recent effort by Function to team up with a top AI platform. On a weekly basis, hundreds of thousands of individuals are informed about this innovative integration, showcasing the commitment to enhancing data accessibility and health outcomes.

data.description: This news release is specifically for distribution within Canada and is not intended for distribution to United States newswire services or dissemination in the United States.

data.title: Court Ruling Blocking Pentagon Press Restrictions Is a Victory for Press Freedom
data.description: On March 20, 2026, the President of the National Press Club, Mark Schoeff, Jr., made a statement in response to a federal judge's decision regarding a Trump administration policy affecting reporters' access to the Pentagon. The judge ruled that crucial elements of the policy are unconstitutional. This decision marks a significant development in the ongoing debate surrounding media access in governmental institutions.

Renewed drone attack targets US diplomatic facility near Iraq's Baghdad airport, fire reported according to security sources.

data.title: LevelUp Stays Announces Rapid Growth in Short-Term Rental Management and Ambitious Expansion Plans
data.description: In Kissimmee and Davenport, Florida, on March 20, 2026, LevelUp Stays, a fast-growing company specializing in managing short-term rental properties co-founded by Derek and Lauren Gisriel, has achieved a significant milestone. The company is expanding its operations in various vacation rental markets and is experiencing rapid growth.

data.title: Volato Announces Receipt of Continued Listing Standards Notice From NYSE American
data.description: Atlanta-based Volato Group, Inc. (NYSE American: SOAR) disclosed today receiving a notice from NYSE American LLC on March 17, 2026, indicating non-compliance with listing standards. The notice, citing Section 1003(a)(i) of the NYSE American Company Guide, specifies a requirement for stockholders’ equity to be a minimum of $2.0 million. As per the notice, Volato has fallen short of this benchmark.

data.title: Morris H. Lilienthal Named in "3 Best Personal Injury Lawyers in Huntsville, AL" List
data.description: In Huntsville, Alabama, on February 19, 2026, Martinson & Beason, P.C. proudly shares the recognition of Morris H. Lilienthal as one of the top "3 Best Personal Injury Lawyers in Huntsville, AL" by Three Best Rated®. This prestigious selection highlights the expertise of local businesses, with Lilienthal standing out among the top three in the region.
